message:
fix(loader): support git worktrees when finding beads directory

GetBeadsDir now detects git worktrees and finds .beads in the main
repository root instead of failing when run from a worktree.

The fix:
1. First checks if .beads exists in the given path
2. If not found and we're in a git repo, checks git-common-dir vs git-dir
3. For worktrees, uses git-common-dir parent as the main repo root
4. Looks for .beads in the main repo root

Fixes #66

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
